title: theobroma obovatum
intro: Theobroma obovatum, also known as the African cacao, is a species of tree in the family Malvaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to lower blood pressure and act as an anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Theobroma obovatum include its potential to reduce the risk of heart disease, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
